title: elymus pungens subsp. pycnanthus
intro: Elymus pungens subsp. pycnanthus, also known as the pycnanthus blue grama, is a type of perennial grass that is native to the high-altitude grasslands of the western United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Elymus pungens subsp. pycnanthus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues.
